name: 半衰期
subject: physics
domain_name: 核物理 / Nuclear Physics / Nuclear Physics
curriculum_points: 1 Describe the use of rulers and measuring cylinders to find a length or a volume
2 Describe how to measure a variety of time intervals using clocks and digital timers
3 Determine an average value for a small distance and for a short interval of time by measuring multiples (including the period of oscillation of a pendulum)

excerpts.text: 1 Describe the use of rulers and measuring cylinders to find a length or a volume
2 Describe how to measure a variety of time intervals using clocks and digital timers
3 Determine an average value for a small distance and for a short interval of time by measuring multiples (including the period of oscillation of a pendulum)

interactive_resources.description: GeoGebra 物理公式可视化：调节参数观察物理量关系
